
================================================================================
k = 2

Entry format: Cremona label (Permutation primes, Rational k-division root?)
Permutation primes = # of primes p <= 1000 with gcd((p+1)^2-a_p^2, 2 ) = 1.
Yes = k-th division polynomial has a rational root, No = none

k = 10
================================================================================
Entry format: Cremona label (Permutation primes, Rational k-division root?)
Permutation primes = # of primes p <= 1000 with gcd((p+1)^2-a_p^2, 10 ) = 1.
Yes = k-th division polynomial has a rational root, No = none
